description_long: This oven features a modern, rectangular design with a predominantly black exterior and large glass panels on the front and sides. The front face includes a wide, horizontally-oriented window, allowing visibility into the oven's interior. The oven door appears to open downward, with side panels that also open outward, providing full access to the cooking chamber. The top surface is flat and bordered by subtle ridges, while the interior is spacious and lined with metallic rails for supporting trays or racks. The overall construction suggests a robust appliance suitable for urban kitchens or commercial settings, with a sleek, minimalist aesthetic.
description: A sleek, black oven with large glass panels and a wide front window, featuring side-opening panels and a flat top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide glass window and the solid, rectangular black frame.
description_view_1: View with the oven door and side panels open, revealing the spacious interior and metallic rails.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front but without the window, emphasizing the solid black panel.
description_view_3: Open rear view, mirroring view 1, with both side panels open and the interior fully visible.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel is present on any side of the oven; the surfaces are smooth and unadorned, with no knobs, buttons, or display elements apparent.
attribute_door_handle_type: The handle is integrated into the top edge of the oven door, running horizontally and flush with the surface, appearing to be made of metal or plastic with a minimalist, ergonomic design.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large, horizontally-oriented rectangular window is centered on the oven door, providing a clear view into the interior.
